---
title: "6. MVFS k-Calculation (k-prototypes; MVFS feature set)"
author: "Sam A. Sievertsen"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: false
    df_print: paged
params:
  # Root repo path (container-safe). Set this from SLURM
  repo: !r Sys.getenv("REPO", unset = NA)

  # I/O built off repo
  risk_data_rel: "data/data_processed/risk_variable_data.csv"
  out_dir_rel: "../../../results/main_analysis/1_clustering/6_mvfs_k_calculation"

  # Candidate MVFS feature sets to evaluate
  # - for now, just "mvfs7": the 7-feature mixed-type set (includes family_history_depression)
  which_sets: ["mvfs7"]

  mvfs7_features:
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__dep_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__aggr_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__attn_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__anx_tscore
    - mh_p_gbi_sum
    - sds_total
    - family_history_depression

  mvfs6_features:
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__dep_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__aggr_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__attn_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__anx_tscore
    - mh_p_gbi_sum
    - sds_total
    
  mvfs5_features:
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__dep_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__aggr_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__synd__attn_tscore
    - mh_p_cbcl__dsm__anx_tscore
    - mh_p_gbi_sum

  # k-prototypes search grid
  k_grid: [2,3,4,5,6,7,8]
  nstart: 8

  # Lambda handling
  # - "estimate": lambdaest() when mixed-type; else lambda irrelevant
  # - "fixed": use lambda_fixed
  lambda_mode: "estimate"
  lambda_fixed: 2.5

  # Stability bootstrap
  boot_B: 250
  boot_seed: 123

  # UMAP settings
  umap_neighbors: 15
  umap_min_dist: 0.1
  umap_seed: 123

  # Misc
  keep_model_data: true
---

```{r global, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE, results = "markup", verbose = TRUE, comment = "")
```

## 6.1 Setup & Paths

``` {r set up, include = FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.1 Set Up ##

cat("6.1 Set-up beginning\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(glue)
  library(purrr)
  library(tibble)
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(clustMixType)
  library(cluster)
  library(clue)
  library(uwot)
})

#6.1.1 Resolve repo-rooted paths (container-safe)
if (is.null(params$repo) || is.na(params$repo) || !nzchar(params$repo)) {
  stop("params$repo is missing. Pass REPO via Sys.getenv() (recommended) or set params$repo in YAML.")
}
repo <- normalizePath(params$repo, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

#6.1.2 Allow explicit overrides, otherwise build from repo + rel paths
risk_path <- if (!is.null(params$risk_data_path) && nzchar(params$risk_data_path)) {
  params$risk_data_path
} else {
  file.path(repo, params$risk_data_rel)
}

out_dir <- if (!is.null(params$out_dir) && nzchar(params$out_dir)) {
  params$out_dir
} else {
  file.path(repo, params$out_dir_rel)
}

#6.1.3 Re-assign into params-like locals for downstream consistency
risk_path <- normalizePath(risk_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
out_dir <- normalizePath(out_dir,   winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

#6.1.4 Output directories
paths <- list(
  out_dir = out_dir,
  fig_dir = file.path(out_dir, "figures"),
  tab_dir = file.path(out_dir, "tables"),
  rds_dir = file.path(out_dir, "rds"))

dir.create(paths$out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE) 
dir.create(paths$fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE) 
dir.create(paths$tab_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE) 
dir.create(paths$rds_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

#6.1.5 Safe writers
write_csv2 <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), TRUE, TRUE)
  readr::write_csv(x, path)
}

save_rds2 <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), TRUE, TRUE)
  saveRDS(x, path)
}

cat("6.1 Set-up complete\n")

```

## 6.2 Load Data + MVFS Feature Sets

```{r load assets, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.2 Load Assets ## 

#6.2.1 Read in risk dataset safely
if (!file.exists(risk_path)) stop(glue("Risk data CSV not found: {risk_path}"))
risk_df_raw <- readr::read_csv(risk_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
risk_dt_raw <- as.data.table(risk_df_raw)

#6.2.2 Define feature sets
mvfs_sets <- list(
  mvfs7 = params$mvfs7_features)

#6.2.3 Restrict to requested sets
use_sets <- params$which_sets
use_sets <- use_sets[use_sets %in% names(mvfs_sets)]
if (!length(use_sets)) stop("No valid feature sets found in params$which_sets.")

#6.2.4 Basic feature existence check
for (nm in use_sets) {
  feats <- mvfs_sets[[nm]]
  missing <- setdiff(feats, names(risk_dt_raw))
  if (length(missing)) {
    stop(glue("Missing features for set '{nm}': {paste(missing, collapse=', ')}"))
  }
}

#6.2.5 Keep row id for merges
id_col <- if ("participant_id" %in% names(risk_dt_raw)) "participant_id" else NULL
risk_dt_raw[, .row_id := .I]

cat(glue("Loaded N={nrow(risk_dt_raw)} rows. ID col = {ifelse(is.null(id_col),'(none)',id_col)}\n"))

```

## 6.3 Preprocessing Helpers for MVFS-only

```{r helper functions, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.3 Helper Functions ##

#6.3.1 Force known categorical risk variables to factor
force_known_categoricals <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)

  known_cat <- intersect(
    c("family_history_depression", "family_history_mania", "bullying"),
    names(df)
  )

  for (nm in known_cat) {
    df[[nm]] <- factor(df[[nm]])
  }

  df
}

#6.3.2 Coerce likely numerics numeric
coerce_types_mvfs <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)

  for (nm in names(df)) {
    x <- df[[nm]]

    #6.3.2.1 If already numeric, keep numeric
    if (is.numeric(x)) next

    #6.3.2.2 If logical, treat as factor
    if (is.logical(x)) {
      df[[nm]] <- factor(x, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
      next
    }

    #6.3.2.3 If character, factor
    if (is.character(x)) {
      df[[nm]] <- factor(x)
      next
    }

    #6.3.2.4 If integer but looks categorical (small number of unique levels), treat as factor
    if (is.integer(x)) {
      u <- unique(x[!is.na(x)])
      if (length(u) <= 10) df[[nm]] <- factor(x) else df[[nm]] <- as.numeric(x)
      next
    }

    #6.3.2.5 Otherwise try factor
    if (!is.factor(x)) df[[nm]] <- factor(x)
  }

  df
}

#6.3.3 Z-score numeric columns (MVFS-only)
zscore_numeric <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  is_num <- vapply(df, is.numeric, logical(1))
  for (nm in names(df)[is_num]) {
    x <- df[[nm]]
    mu <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    sdv <- stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.finite(sdv) && sdv > 0) {
      df[[nm]] <- (x - mu) / sdv
    } else {
      
      #6.3.3.1 Constant or degenerate => set to 0
      df[[nm]] <- 0
    }
  }
  df
}

#6.3.4 Ensure kproto input has at least 1 numeric + 1 factor
count_types <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  is_num <- vapply(df, is.numeric, logical(1))
  is_fac <- vapply(df, is.factor,  logical(1))
  list(n_num = sum(is_num), n_fac = sum(is_fac), is_num = is_num, is_fac = is_fac)
}

prep_for_kproto <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  ct <- count_types(df)
  add_num <- (ct$n_num == 0L)
  add_fac <- (ct$n_fac == 0L)

  if (add_num) df$.mvfs_dummy_num <- 0
  if (add_fac) df$.mvfs_dummy_fac <- factor("A")

  list(x = df, added_dummy = (add_num || add_fac), ct = ct)
}

#6.3.5 Lambda rule
lambda_safe <- function(X_orig, lambda_mode, lambda_fixed = 2.5) {
  if (identical(lambda_mode, "fixed")) {
    return(list(lambda = as.numeric(lambda_fixed), reason = "fixed"))
  }

  ct <- count_types(X_orig)
  if (ncol(X_orig) < 2L) {
    return(list(lambda = 1, reason = "p<2: lambdaest undefined; lambda irrelevant"))
  }
  if (ct$n_num == 0L || ct$n_fac == 0L) {
    return(list(lambda = 1, reason = "single-type set: lambda irrelevant"))
  }

  lam <- clustMixType::lambdaest(X_orig, verbose = FALSE)
  list(lambda = lam, reason = "lambdaest (mixed-type set)")
}

#6.3.6 Objective extractor
kproto_objective <- function(kp) {
  for (nm in c("tot.withinss","tot.withindist","tot.within.dist","tot.within")) {
    if (!is.null(kp[[nm]]) && is.finite(kp[[nm]])) return(as.numeric(kp[[nm]]))
  }
  NA_real_
}

#6.3.7 Silhouette on fitted kproto
extract_validation_index <- function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x) && length(x) == 1L) return(as.numeric(x))
  if (is.list(x) && "index" %in% names(x)) return(as.numeric(x$index))
  if (is.list(x) && "index_opt" %in% names(x)) return(as.numeric(x$index_opt))
  NA_real_
}

silhouette_validation_kproto <- function(kp, type = "huang") {
  out <- tryCatch(
    clustMixType::validation_kproto(method = "silhouette", object = kp, type = type),
    error = function(e) NA)
  extract_validation_index(out)
}

#6.3.8 UMAP design matrix for mixed data (one-hot factors + numeric)
make_umap_matrix <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  
  #6.3.8.1 model.matrix will one-hot encode factors; keep numerics as-is
  mm <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = df)
  
  #6.3.8.2 Scale numeric columns inside mm since that avoids huge one-hot dominance issues
  mm <- scale(mm)
  mm
}

#6.3.9 Clean kproto object for stability_kproto()
clean_kproto_for_stability <- function(kp) {
  kp2 <- kp

  #6.3.9.1 Ensure data is a plain data.frame, no rownames
  kp2$data <- as.data.frame(kp2$data)
  rownames(kp2$data) <- NULL

  #6.3.9.2 Ensure cluster is a plain integer vector, no names
  kp2$cluster <- as.integer(kp2$cluster)
  names(kp2$cluster) <- NULL

  #6.3.9.3 Ensure lambda is scalar numeric
  if (!is.null(kp2$lambda)) kp2$lambda <- as.numeric(kp2$lambda)[1]

  kp2
}

```

## 6.4 Main Loop for Fitting k=2:8 for Each MVFS Set

```{r mvfs k calculation loop, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.4 Fit the k=2:8 Solution Across MVFS ##

#6.4 Function loop for running k calculation
run_one_set <- function(set_name, feats) {

  cat(glue("\n--- Running set: {set_name} (p={length(feats)}) ---\n"))

  #6.4.1 Build MVFS-only frame
  dt <- risk_dt_raw[, c(".row_id", id_col, feats), with = FALSE]
  X <- as.data.frame(dt[, feats, with = FALSE])

  #6.4.2 Force known categorical variables, then coerce remaining types, then z-score numerics
  X <- force_known_categoricals(X)
  X <- coerce_types_mvfs(X)
  X <- zscore_numeric(X)

  #6.4.3 Lambda
  lam_info <- lambda_safe(X, lambda_mode = params$lambda_mode, lambda_fixed = params$lambda_fixed)

  #6.4.4 Ensure kproto can run for single-type sets
  prep <- prep_for_kproto(X)
  X_fit <- prep$x

  #6.4.5 Fit across k
  res_list <- list()
  model_list <- list()
  assign_list <- list()

  for (k in params$k_grid) {

    #6.4.5.1 Fit
    set.seed(6000 + k)
    kp <- clustMixType::kproto(
      x = X_fit,
      k = as.integer(k),
      lambda = lam_info$lambda,
      nstart = as.integer(params$nstart),
      verbose = FALSE)

    lbl <- kp$cluster
    k_obs <- length(unique(lbl))
    min_n <- min(tabulate(lbl))

    #6.4.5.2 Metrics
    sil <- if (k_obs >= 2 && min_n >= 2) silhouette_validation_kproto(kp, type = "huang") else NA_real_
    obj <- kproto_objective(kp)

    #6.4.5.3 Stability (stability_kproto: Rand + Jaccard)
    if (k_obs >= 2 && min_n >= 2) {
    
      # Clean object to avoid stability_kproto() internal length mismatches
      kp_stab <- clean_kproto_for_stability(kp)
    
      set.seed(params$boot_seed + 100L * k)
    
      stab_formals <- names(formals(clustMixType::stability_kproto))
      stab_args <- list(
        object  = kp_stab,
        method  = c("rand", "jaccard"),
        nstart  = as.integer(params$nstart),
        verbose = FALSE
      )
    
      if ("B" %in% stab_formals) {
        stab_args$B <- as.integer(params$boot_B)
      } else if ("nboot" %in% stab_formals) {
        stab_args$nboot <- as.integer(params$boot_B)
      }
    
      stab_raw <- tryCatch(
        do.call(clustMixType::stability_kproto, stab_args),
        error = function(e) {
          stop(glue("stability_kproto() failed at k={k}: {conditionMessage(e)}"))
        }
      )
    
      stab_overall <- stab_raw[[1]]
      stab_tbl <- as.data.frame(stab_raw[[2]])
      colnames(stab_tbl) <- c("B", "Rand", "Jaccard")
    
    } else {
      stab_overall <- c(R = NA_real_, J = NA_real_)
      stab_tbl <- data.frame(B = integer(0), Rand = numeric(0), Jaccard = numeric(0))
    }

    #6.4.5.4 Store
    res_list[[as.character(k)]] <- tibble::tibble(
      set = set_name,
      k = as.integer(k),
      k_observed = as.integer(k_obs),
      min_cluster_n = as.integer(min_n),
      lambda = as.numeric(lam_info$lambda),
      lambda_reason = lam_info$reason,
      added_dummy = prep$added_dummy,
      objective = as.numeric(obj),
      silhouette_huang = as.numeric(sil),
      rand_overall = as.numeric(stab_overall["R"]),
      jacc_overall = as.numeric(stab_overall["J"]),
      rand_mean = mean(stab_tbl$Rand,    na.rm = TRUE),
      jacc_mean = mean(stab_tbl$Jaccard, na.rm = TRUE),
      rand_sd = sd(stab_tbl$Rand, na.rm = TRUE),
      jacc_sd = sd(stab_tbl$Jaccard, na.rm = TRUE))

    #6.4.5.5 Save assignment table
    assign_tbl <- dt[, .(._row_id = .row_id)]
    if (!is.null(id_col)) assign_tbl[[id_col]] <- dt[[id_col]]
    assign_tbl[["cluster"]] <- as.integer(lbl)
    assign_tbl[["k"]] <- as.integer(k)
    assign_tbl[["set"]] <- set_name

    assign_list[[as.character(k)]] <- assign_tbl

    #6.4.5.6 Save model (optionally trim data)
    if (!params$keep_model_data) kp$data <- NULL
    model_list[[as.character(k)]] <- kp
  }

  res_df <- bind_rows(res_list) %>% arrange(k)

  #6.4.6 Write outputs
  write_csv2(res_df, file.path(paths$tab_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_k_grid_metrics.csv")))
  assign_df <- rbindlist(assign_list, fill = TRUE)
  write_csv2(as.data.frame(assign_df), file.path(paths$tab_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_k_grid_assignments.csv")))
  save_rds2(model_list, file.path(paths$rds_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_k_grid_models.rds")))

  #6.4.7 Plot: silhouette + stability across k
  p1 <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = k, y = silhouette_huang)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = glue("Silhouette across k (MVFS: {set_name})"),
      subtitle = glue("lambda_mode={params$lambda_mode}; lambda={round(lam_info$lambda, 3)}; nstart={params$nstart}"),
      x = "k", y = "Silhouette (Huang)")
  ggsave(file.path(paths$fig_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_silhouette_by_k.png")),
         p1, width = 7, height = 4.2, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

  p2 <- ggplot(res_df, aes(x = k, y = jacc_mean)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = glue("Bootstrap stability across k (MVFS: {set_name})"),
      subtitle = glue("Metric = min clusterwise Jaccard; B={params$boot_B}"),
      x = "k", y = "min Jaccard")
  ggsave(file.path(paths$fig_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_jacc_mean_by_k.png")),
         p2, width = 7, height = 4.2, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

  #6.4.8 UMAP visualization for a single k choice: pick argmax silhouette (ties => smaller k)
  k_star <- res_df %>%
    filter(is.finite(silhouette_huang)) %>%
    arrange(desc(silhouette_huang), k) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(k)

  if (length(k_star) == 1 && is.finite(k_star)) {

    kp_star <- model_list[[as.character(k_star)]]
    lbl_star <- kp_star$cluster

    set.seed(params$umap_seed)
    mm <- make_umap_matrix(X_fit)
    emb <- uwot::umap(
      mm,
      n_neighbors = params$umap_neighbors,
      min_dist = params$umap_min_dist,
      metric = "euclidean",
      verbose = TRUE)

    umap_df <- tibble::tibble(
      UMAP1 = emb[, 1],
      UMAP2 = emb[, 2],
      cluster = factor(lbl_star))

    p3 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
      theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
      labs(
        title = glue("UMAP of MVFS feature space (set={set_name})"),
        subtitle = glue("k*={k_star} (max silhouette); n_neighbors={params$umap_neighbors}, min_dist={params$umap_min_dist}"),
        x = "UMAP1", y = "UMAP2", color = "Cluster")
    ggsave(file.path(paths$fig_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_umap_k{k_star}.png")),
           p3, width = 7.2, height = 5.2, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

    #6.4.8.1 Save embedding table
    write_csv2(
      umap_df %>% mutate(set = set_name, k = as.integer(k_star)),
      file.path(paths$tab_dir, glue("mvfs_{set_name}_umap_k{k_star}.csv")))
  }

  #6.4.9 Return objects for in-knit inspection
  list(
    set = set_name,
    features = feats,
    lambda_info = lam_info,
    metrics = res_df)
}

all_runs <- lapply(use_sets, function(nm) run_one_set(nm, mvfs_sets[[nm]]))
names(all_runs) <- use_sets

```

## 6.5 Summary Table Across MVFS Sets

```{r summary, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.5 Summary Table of Results ##

summary_df <- bind_rows(lapply(all_runs, function(x) x$metrics)) %>%
  group_by(set) %>%
  arrange(desc(silhouette_huang), desc(jacc_mean), k) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv2(summary_df, file.path(paths$tab_dir, "mvfs_all_sets_k_grid_metrics_long.csv"))

#6.5.1 One-row recommendation per set (argmax silhouette; tie-break by higher jacc_mean then smaller k)
best_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(is.finite(silhouette_huang)) %>%
  group_by(set) %>%
  arrange(desc(silhouette_huang), desc(jacc_mean), k) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv2(best_df, file.path(paths$tab_dir, "mvfs_all_sets_k_recommendation.csv"))

knitr::kable(best_df, digits = 3, caption = "Recommended k per MVFS set (max silhouette; tie-break by stability then smaller k)") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

```

## 6.6 Reproducibility Log

```{r reproducibility log, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

## 6.6 Reproducibility Log ##

log <- list(
  timestamp = as.character(Sys.time()),
  repo = repo,
  risk_data_path = risk_path,
  out_dir = paths$out_dir,
  sets_run = use_sets,
  k_grid = params$k_grid,
  nstart = params$nstart,
  lambda_mode = params$lambda_mode,
  lambda_fixed = params$lambda_fixed,
  boot_B = params$boot_B,
  boot_seed = params$boot_seed,
  umap = list(
    n_neighbors = params$umap_neighbors,
    min_dist = params$umap_min_dist,
    seed = params$umap_seed))

writeLines(jsonlite::toJSON(log, pretty = TRUE), con = file.path(paths$out_dir, "run_log.json"))

```
